creator: sprice@hiwaay.net
text:
---------- Forwarded message ----------
Date: Fri, 5 Nov 1999 09:00:51 -0500 (EST)
From: Chris D. Faulhaber <jedgar@fxp.org>
To: mharo@FreeBSD.ORG
Cc: freebsd-ports@FreeBSD.ORG
Subject: Re: ports/14501: Update port: misc/rfc

On Wed, 27 Oct 1999 mharo@FreeBSD.org wrote:

> I'm getting a different MD5 checksum.  Could you verify that the distfile
> on the mastersite is correct and that the md5 changed but nothing else.
> 

Yes, the author had added another url to the script...the correct checksum 
is now:
MD5 (rfc) = 96df9ac52eccfa0bce7abc24e7bcc341

(oddly enough, I could have sworn I had repied to this earlier but the PR 
doesn't show my response)

-----
Chris D. Faulhaber <jedgar@fxp.org> | All the true gurus I've met never
System/Network Administrator,       | claimed they were one and always
Reality Check Information, Inc.     | pointed to someone better.
